name: submit_callback_request
description: Submits a callback request when the AI cannot resolve the caller's issue. Use this after tool failures (after one retry), for complex questions needing human follow-up, after-hours non-emergency messages, billing inquiries when the caller declines transfer, or when the caller is frustrated and doesn't want to be transferred.

requestBodySchema.description: Submits a callback request so a team member can follow up with the caller. Used when the AI cannot complete the caller's request due to tool failures, complex questions, or caller preference.

customer_name.description: The full name of the customer requesting a callback.

phone.description: The customer's phone number for the callback. Format as digits only (e.g., '6025550123').

reason.description: Brief description of why a callback is needed (e.g., 'scheduling system unavailable', 'billing question about invoice', 'complex repair question').

email.description: The customer's email address, if provided.

urgency.description: Urgency level of the callback. Use 'normal' for standard requests, 'high' for callers who have been unable to get help or have urgent non-emergency needs.

preferred_callback_time.description: The caller's preferred time to receive a callback (e.g., 'morning', 'after 2pm', 'anytime tomorrow').
